title: WORKFLOW v0.0.18 Approval Mode Enforcement
changes: Rewrite gate logic with matrix-based requiresVizConfirm — manual gates all, auto-approval gates completions only, auto/semi free
Add auto-approval option to liaison mode dropdown
Add Complete button on review+liaison and approval+liaison cards in manual+auto-approval modes
Approve/Rework buttons shown only in manual mode
Re-render detail panel when liaison mode changes for button visibility
Server validation accepts auto-approval as valid mode
